response.overview: Using the contents of a 128GB mobile phone storage archive, filmmaker Illuca Shanahan assembles a conceptual film sculpture from found footage, personal media and digital remnants. The work investigates contemporary memory, digital possessions and the modern equivalent of a suitcase while evoking themes of human connection and religious ecstasy.
response.tagline: Is it future, or is it past?
response.title: 128gb Suitcase (GOD IS REAL)
